description_long: This is a modern rectangular desk with a dark, wood-textured surface and minimalist design. The tabletop is flat and spacious, supported by two pairs of angled, slender legs that provide stability while maintaining a sleek profile. The legs are positioned at the ends of the desk, leaving ample legroom underneath. The desk has no visible drawers, shelves, or additional attachments, emphasizing a clean and functional aesthetic. Its dark finish and simple lines make it suitable for contemporary urban environments. The overall construction suggests durability and a focus on practicality.
description: A modern, dark wood-textured rectangular desk with angled minimalist legs and a clean, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the rectangular tabletop and the angled legs at each end.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow depth of the desk and the V-shaped leg arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the tabletop and angled legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the desk's depth and the angled legs' profile.
attribute_orientation: The long edge with the angled legs facing outward is intended to face the user, with no drawers or distinguishing features on any side.
attribute_usage_context: general workspace for writing, laptop use, or meetings
